$schema_note: Sprint brief for the Sanders Intelligence app. Updated on 2026-06-20 after the user selected a carryover-first 1-week sprint.
theme: Finish carryover integrations and QA polish: Action Center loading trust, SellerCloud SKU matching, and the first live-sales path for Monthly Star.

project.name: Sanders intelligence app
project.stack: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite, Tailwind, React Router v6, TanStack Query v5, Supabase, Recharts

selection_rationale: Carryover work wins this sprint. The Sales Star UI task is already completed, while the Action Center loading bug, SellerCloud SKU matching, and SellerCloud sales collection are still the highest-trust open items from the 2026-06-22 plan.
instructions_for_implementer: Work tasks in order. Keep the Sales Star UI task closed. Defer SKU admin review/override UI, cost-increase alerts, notifications, mobile responsiveness, and Phase 3 work.

tasks.title: BUG: Action Center shows empty success states while inventory rows are still loading
tasks.outline: Prevent misleading empty-success copy on Action Center while deferred inventory rows are still settling.
tasks.technical_description: Use a shared loading helper in ActionCenter.helpers.ts and gate table empty-state branches in ActionCenter.tsx before rendering the empty messages.
requirements: At-risk, backorder, and overstock tables show loading copy while inventory rows are loading or deferred rows are settling.
Genuine empty states still render after loading completes.
completion_criteria: Cold-loading /purchasing/action-center does not show empty-success copy before rows settle.
Focused Action Center helper tests pass.
expected_outcomes: Purchasing users no longer see a false all-clear while inventory data is still loading.

unit: ActionCenter.helpers.test.ts: loading helper returns true for query loading and deferred settling.
manual_qa: Hard-refresh /purchasing/action-center and confirm table bodies show loading copy until rows settle.

tasks.pre_implementation_instruction: Implemented with a simple loading row; no UX decision required.

tasks.title: FEATURE: Auto-match SC PO SKUs to inventory
tasks.outline: Populate sku_bridge and backfill po_items.planning_sku so Purchase Orders and Inbound show fewer Unmatched rows.
tasks.technical_description: Add a tested shared SKU matching module plus a match-sellercloud-skus Edge Function. The routine loads unmatched PO source SKUs, compares them against product_code values from the latest complete inventory upload, inserts confident bridge rows, and backfills po_items.
requirements: Auto-insert only direct and high-confidence canonical matches.
Respect existing active sku_bridge rows so reruns are idempotent.
Return before/after unmatched counts and match rate.
completion_criteria: SKU matching tests cover direct, canonical, ambiguous, bridge rows, and summary math.
Edge Function reports inserted bridge rows, matched source SKUs, backfilled items, and after-unmatched count.
expected_outcomes: SellerCloud PO lines can resolve to inventory SKUs without a manual bridge entry for every exact/canonical match.

unit: sku-match.test.ts: direct, compact canonical, ambiguous, insert-row, and backfill summary cases.
integration: Run match-sellercloud-skus twice in Supabase; the second run should insert zero duplicate active bridge rows.
manual_qa: Open /purchasing/inbound and /purchasing/purchase-orders; compare Unmatched counts before and after the function runs.

tasks.title: FEATURE: Sales data collection from SellerCloud
tasks.outline: Create the first live-sales path so Monthly Star can use SellerCloud sales rows when available and fall back to admin-entered values otherwise.
tasks.technical_description: Add a sales_daily table keyed by sale_date + channel + source_sku, a configurable sync-sales Edge Function that mirrors the purchase-order auth/cursor pattern, and a North Star hook/helper path that derives Monthly Star MTD, LY MTD, and channel deltas from live rows.
requirements: Store sales at date + channel + source SKU grain.
Use SELLERCLOUD_SALES_ENDPOINT as an override, defaulting to an Orders-style endpoint until the exact report endpoint is confirmed.
Resolve planning_sku through sku_bridge when possible.
Monthly Star prefers live current-month sales rows and falls back to admin-entered values when no live rows exist.
completion_criteria: Migration creates sales_daily and scheduled sync wrapper.
sync-sales is idempotent through upsert on sale_date, channel, and source_sku.
NorthStar helper tests cover live-sales Monthly Star derivation.
expected_outcomes: Leadership can see Monthly Star driven by live sales data as soon as SellerCloud sales rows are available.

unit: NorthStar.helpers.test.ts: live sales rows derive MTD, LY MTD, days, and channel deltas.
integration: Deploy migration/function and invoke sync-sales with a small maxPages/pageSize batch.
manual_qa: Open /executive/north-star; confirm Monthly Star renders with live sales if sales_daily has current-month rows, otherwise with manual fallback values.

clarifying_questions: Confirm the production SellerCloud sales endpoint/report and set SELLERCLOUD_SALES_ENDPOINT if it is not /api/Orders.
tasks.pre_implementation_instruction: Endpoint remains configurable because the repo does not contain final SellerCloud sales-report documentation.

sprint_close_checklist: Run cd app && npm run build.
Deploy Supabase migration 019 and Edge Functions match-sellercloud-skus and sync-sales.
Set SELLERCLOUD_SALES_ENDPOINT if the production sales report differs from /api/Orders.
Update Asana tasks with file/line evidence after verification.
